name: aasvg
description: Turn ASCII art diagrams into SVG
author: Martin Thomson <mt@lowentropy.net>

scripts.test: set -e;[ "aasvg $(jq -r .version <package.json)" = "$(./main.js version)" ];svg=$(mktemp); trap "rm $svg" EXIT;./main.js backdrop <example.txt >"$svg"; diff -u example.svg "$svg"
scripts.release: set -e;npm run test;t="v$(jq -r .version <package.json)"; git tag "$t"; git push origin "$t";npm publish
